channel.title: Base Weight Bulletin
channel.description: Fresh takes for ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in food with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest food adjustments that ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: thru hike food planning
item.description: The persistent myths around thru hike food planning, stress-tested against what ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your packs in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying packs project for ultralight backpackers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/Ultralight is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the skills community this week.

item.title: The food checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified food purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of shelters
item.description: The most common early stumbles in shelters, and the cheap corrections that fix them for ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers.

item.title: "lower base weight cheap" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about lower base weight cheap through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your skills questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the skills questions ultralight backpackers and thru-hike dreamers keep asking, minus the hedging.
